name: Resolution Guard
description: Policy enforcement and audit trail for consequential agent actions. Intercepts MCP tool calls, enforces limits, and logs all resolution actions.

track_patterns.label: Tool name patterns to track
track_patterns.help: Any tool whose name contains one of these patterns will be policy-checked and audited

max_refund_amount.label: Maximum refund amount without human approval (in cents)

require_approval_actions.label: Actions that always require human approval

blocked_actions.label: Actions the agent must never take
